sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99340" key="sunantimesourane/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συναντι-μεσουρᾰνέω</orth>, <sense id="n99340.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be in the opposite meridian at the same time,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cat.Cod.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(1).230</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
